title: Plastia Floor Vase Insert for Flower Vases 24 x 10,5 cm (2-Pack) - Insert for Plastic Floor Vases - Vase Insert for Grave Vase
features: Universal – universal vase insert, waterproof, is ideal for placing bouquets in larger amphoras or floor vases. Large floor vases can also be used for smaller bouquets and flower arrangements with this practical and hygienic plastic vase insert.
Practical – thanks to the hygienic plastic, which the useful helper is used, the use is easy to clean and easy to clean after each use.
Robust – The grave vase insert is made of UV-resistant plastic. The material makes it particularly durable and weather-resistant.
Branded product – not from China, but from the Bohemian Mahogany Highlands. Family business with 25 years of tradition.
Dimensions: height of the vase insert approx. 24 cm, diameter of the opening approx. 10,5 cm. Colour: transparent
description: With this flower vase insert, you are purchasing the perfect addition to any flower vase. In addition, this is also the ideal aid for the use of vases made of materials that would be rather unsuitable as a water container. Thanks to the enlarged opening, this vase insert is particularly practical. It is also extremely hygienic, as it is easy to clean thanks to its robust and easy-care material. This insert is also suitable for a cemetery vase. Diameter of the top opening: approx. 10,5 cm. Height: approx. 24 cm. Material: high-quality plastic Colour: transparent
